title: Cyanoacetylene
body:
Cyanoacetylene is an organic compound with the formula C3HN or H‚àíC‚â°C‚àíC‚â°N. It is the simplest cyanopolyyne. Cyanoacetylene has been detected by spectroscopic methods in interstellar clouds, in the coma of comet Hale‚ÄìBopp and in the atmosphere of Saturn's moon Titan, where it sometimes forms expansive fog-like clouds.
Cyanoacetylene is one of the molecules that was produced in the Miller‚ÄìUrey experiment.
